backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining types for citizen eligibility records and benefit schemes, with placeholder functions for eligibility checking and money requests; includes state for balance, system status, eligible citizens map, and paid citizens set.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a requirement to regenerate the CSV dataset with 500 records instead of 2000, maintaining the existing schema with varied data across income tiers, schemes, regions, and account statuses.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of frontend files describing the React application structure with transaction processing, admin dashboard, validation display, and a 500-record CSV dataset with citizen benefit eligibility data.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including primary, secondary, destructive, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Jan-Dhan Gateway application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component with tabbed interface switching between transaction processing (with form and history) and admin dashboard views.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component displaying system status, emergency pause controls, budget monitoring with progress bar, transaction counts, and security feature indicators using mock state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application layout wrapper with header featuring Jan-Dhan Gateway branding and security indicators, plus footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution link.
Transaction submission form with citizen ID input, scheme selection dropdown, and simulated sequential validation through three gates (eligibility, budget, frequency) with animated status display.
frontend/src/components/TransactionHisto: Transaction history viewer displaying mock transaction records with status badges, timestamps, citizen IDs, scheme details, amounts, and rejection reasons in a scrollable list.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance using Internet Identity authentication, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication status with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching system status (Active/Paused/Frozen, budget, transaction count) and transaction history with placeholder implementations polling every 5 seconds.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette using OKLCH color space, defining trust/security themed colors (deep blue primary, teal accent) for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme with custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), OKLCH-based color system, security-themed shadows, and custom animations for accordion and pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing Jan-Dhan Gateway fraud-proof benefit distribution system with SHA-256 hashing, three-gate validation (eligibility/budget/frequency), hash-linked ledger, admin controls, and CSV dataset of 500 citizen records.
